purpose: Tie one simultaneous command-message rejection transition to its claim, proof certificate, schematic trace, rendered SVG, and source-status boundaries.
boundaries: This bundle covers the multi-command recipient rejection boundary.
It preserves init-family recipient command-message consumption as single-token execution only.
It does not add priority, sequencing, non-init execution, standard-signal command-token execution, or write-buffer command-token execution.
